title: Designs on consciousness: literature and predictive processing.

publication.journal: Philos Trans R Soc Lond B Biol Sci

assets.abstract: Predictive processing is a recent approach in cognitive science that describes the brain as an engine of probabilistic hierarchical inference. Initially proposed as a general theory of brain function, predictive processing has recently been expanding to account for questions of consciousness in philosophy and neuroscience.
